response.overview: Detective Reba Rosemary is still haunted by her late partner, struggling to fully move forward despite her marriage to FBI agent Samantha Sage. But when a ruthless masked woman frames her for murder and leaves Sage in a coma, Rosemary’s life begins to collapse. Branded a killer and hunted from all sides, she must race against time to uncover the identity of her attacker before she loses her freedom, her sanity, and the woman she loves forever.
response.title: Rosemary & Sage: Out of Thyme
